item.title: Pissing Off My German Captors
item.description: A WWII veteran recounts daring moments of defiance against German captors. Hear firsthand stories of courage, cleverness, and resistance in captivity.

media:content.media:title: Pissing Off My German Captors
media:content.media:description: A WWII veteran recounts daring moments of defiance against German captors. Hear firsthand stories of courage, cleverness, and resistance in captivity.

item.title: In Ramadi: Every Step a Gamble
item.description: A firsthand account from Iraq’s deadliest city, Ramadi. Hear what it was like to navigate constant danger, risk, and combat in one of the most perilous urban war zones.

media:content.media:title: In Ramadi: Every Step a Gamble
media:content.media:description: A firsthand account from Iraq’s deadliest city, Ramadi. Hear what it was like to navigate constant danger, risk, and combat in one of the most perilous urban war zones.

item.title: The Bravery That Earned a Medal of Honor
item.description: Hear the heroic story behind a Medal of Honor. Learn how extraordinary courage, sacrifice, and decisive action led to one of the highest military honors.

media:content.media:title: The Bravery That Earned a Medal of Honor
media:content.media:description: Hear the heroic story behind a Medal of Honor. Learn how extraordinary courage, sacrifice, and decisive action led to one of the highest military honors.

item.title: How D-Day Pathfinders Navigated the Air
item.description: Discover how D-Day pathfinders guided airborne troops during WWII. Learn the techniques, tools, and bravery required to navigate and mark drop zones under fire.

media:content.media:title: How D-Day Pathfinders Navigated the Air
media:content.media:description: Discover how D-Day pathfinders guided airborne troops during WWII. Learn the techniques, tools, and bravery required to navigate and mark drop zones under fire.

item.title: Medal of Honor Hero Who Dared to Be Human
item.description: Hear the story of a Medal of Honor recipient in Iraq who showed humanity and courage on the battlefield. Discover the actions that defined his heroic legacy.

media:content.media:title: Medal of Honor Hero Who Dared to Be Human
media:content.media:description: Hear the story of a Medal of Honor recipient in Iraq who showed humanity and courage on the battlefield. Discover the actions that defined his heroic legacy.

item.title: John F. Kennedy’s Assassination
item.description: Explore the events surrounding the assassination of President John F. Kennedy. Learn about the timeline, key figures, and lasting impact on American history.

media:content.media:title: John F. Kennedy’s Assassination
media:content.media:description: Explore the events surrounding the assassination of President John F. Kennedy. Learn about the timeline, key figures, and lasting impact on American history.

item.title: You Could Smell Death in Normandy
item.description: A WWII veteran recalls the harrowing sights and smells of Normandy. Hear firsthand the grim realities of battle and the courage required to survive D-Day.

media:content.media:title: You Could Smell Death in Normandy
media:content.media:description: A WWII veteran recalls the harrowing sights and smells of Normandy. Hear firsthand the grim realities of battle and the courage required to survive D-Day.

item.title: What We Did with SS Prisoners
item.description: A historical look at the actions taken with SS prisoners after WWII. Explore the context, decisions, and consequences of this complex period in history.

media:content.media:title: What We Did with SS Prisoners
media:content.media:description: A historical look at the actions taken with SS prisoners after WWII. Explore the context, decisions, and consequences of this complex period in history.

item.title: WWII Submarine Combat with Patrick Zilliacus
item.description: Patrick Zilliacus, a WWII torpedoman on the USS Spot, shares how submarine combat worked in the Pacific. Hear firsthand stories from life aboard a hunter-killer group.

media:content.media:title: WWII Submarine Combat with Patrick Zilliacus
media:content.media:description: Patrick Zilliacus, a WWII torpedoman on the USS Spot, shares how submarine combat worked in the Pacific. Hear firsthand stories from life aboard a hunter-killer group.

item.title: Vietnam Vet Gary Littrell on Mortar Warning Signs
item.description: Medal of Honor recipient Gary Littrell explains how the smell of burnt eggs signaled nearby mortar attacks during the Vietnam War, sharing his firsthand combat experience.

media:content.media:title: Vietnam Vet Gary Littrell on Mortar Warning Signs
media:content.media:description: Medal of Honor recipient Gary Littrell explains how the smell of burnt eggs signaled nearby mortar attacks during the Vietnam War, sharing his firsthand combat experience.
